whistleblower_flags.flag: CRITICAL: Empty code-index forces swarm to operate blind — violates Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) by blocking adaptive verification across all 5 products. Atlas cannot govern what it cannot see.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script appears to have been moved to archive but not replaced in active modules. code-index.json shows recent built_at timestamp with zero content, indicating silent failure.", "recommended_fix": "1. Restore code_index.py from archive. 2. Add healthcheck: if module count = 0 after build, fail explicitly. 3. Add to CI: validate code-index.json contains >0 endpoints pre-deploy."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Builder script appears to have been moved to archive but not replaced in active modules. code-index.json shows recent built_at timestamp with zero content, indicating silent failure.
findings.recommended_fix: 1. Restore code_index.py from archive. 2. Add healthcheck: if module count = 0 after build, fail explicitly. 3. Add to CI: validate code-index.json contains >0 endpoints pre-deploy.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced by live pipeline. code-index.json regeneration fails silently because path resolution points to archived, non-executable location. Empty output violates integrity of dependency mapping.", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py from archive/ back to active package directory. Add pipeline step to verify code-index.json non-emptiness post-build. Add CI check that scans for *.py files in archive/ and blocks execution if referenced in active configs."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced by live pipeline. code-index.json regeneration fails silently because path resolution points to archived, non-executable location. Empty output violates integrity of dependency mapping.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py from archive/ back to active package directory. Add pipeline step to verify code-index.json non-emptiness post-build. Add CI check that scans for *.py files in archive/ and blocks execution if referenced in active configs.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Validate parameters against real data to ensure psychometric soundness"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "question pool", "issue": "Question pool size per competency may be less than 15", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for reliable CAT differentiation"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "No evidence of DIF analysis for bias against AZ/CIS test-takers", "recommended_fix": "Perform DIF analysis to ensure fairness and equity"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be appropriately set", "recommended_fix": "Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal assessment termination"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "temporal decay rationale", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based", "recommended_fix": "Investigate and validate temporal decay rationale with empirical evidence"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Validate parameters against real data to ensure psychometric soundness

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency may be less than 15
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for reliable CAT differentiation

findings.issue: No evidence of DIF analysis for bias against AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Perform DIF analysis to ensure fairness and equity

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriately set
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal assessment termination

findings.issue: 180-day half-life may not be evidence-based
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate and validate temporal decay rationale with empirical evidence

findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow is insufficient
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decisions

findings.issue: Potential compliance issues for Baku launch
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose platform to legal liability
findings.recommended_fix: Develop clear guidelines and safeguards for using AURA scores

findings.issue: DPAs for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway may not be in place
findings.recommended_fix: Verify and establish DPAs for all data processors

findings.issue: Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Update ToS to explicitly address AI-generated assessments
